In this lesson, I want to give you an ultra quick introduction to SamCart. Now again, the reason I chose to include SamCart in the Six Figure Funnel formula is not because I have any financial stake in this application or this company, nor do I stand to make any money whatsoever by recommending this and showing this to you. The reason that I decided to include SamCart in the Six Figure Funnel formula is because it solves a massive problem for new and novice marketers. Number one, SamCart integrates with Stripe and Stripe gives you the opportunity to collect credit card payments without needing a merchant account. Stripe's fees are extremely lower than most other online payment processing applications or websites out there. It gives new and novice marketers the opportunity to collect payments without having to lay out the money for a merchant account and without having to pay for an extensive order form process where you need to have an SSL, security certificate. Everything is taken care of for you with SamCart. The other thing is that you have the ability with SamCart to plug in upsells, to build funnels that are just incredible. The application allows you to build funnels and upsells at will and will give you stats on the conversion of each upsell or downsell. We'll do it all via one click for you. We'll give you the ability to customize the pages, the upsell, downsell pages to your liking and it integrates perfectly with Aweber which is what you're going to be learning how to use to power the transaction maximization sequence as well as the amplification autoresponder chain that I'm going to teach you later on in the Six Figure Funnel formula. This is a tremendous tool and because of this I've asked Brian Moran to create a series of training videos that you'll really find in the next lesson that walk you through using SamCart, how to set up offers in there, how to set up upsells, how to set up funnels, the whole nine. Very simple and very cool.
